assertions.text: On opening the app, the animation should be there and it should be visible to the user

evidence.description: BookMyShow splash screen displayed with white "bookmyshow" logo centered on red background, with tagline "It All Starts Here" beneath the logo.

Animation frame showing white line-art entertainment icons on red background: film reel (upper left), microphone (center-right), vintage microphone (center-bottom), theater mask (lower left), and video/film frame icon (lower right).
BookMyShow logo displayed alone on red background without additional animated elements, indicating animation progression.
Transition to main app content showing "TICKET TO HOLIMOOD" promotional overlay, indicating animation sequence completion.

assertions.explanation: Animation sequence confirmed during app launch. At t=1s, the BookMyShow branded splash screen with logo and tagline "It All Starts Here" appeared. At t=2s, animated entertainment-themed icons (film reel, microphone, theater mask, video frame) were displayed on the red background. At t=3s, the logo remained visible without additional elements. This multi-stage animation sequence was clearly visible to users during the app opening phase before transitioning to the main content at t=4s.
